Manifesto
04

We build garments the way others build structures — with exposed seams, honest materials, and no apologies.

Season 04 is a study in controlled tension. Oversized silhouettes collapse against sharp tailoring. Washed fabrics meet industrial hardware.

Every piece is a contradiction held together by intention.
